summary: All 3 requested fixes verified working: 1) 'Voir la boutique' navigates to vendor shop page correctly 2) 'Faire une offre' opens modal with price input, message, and quick suggestions 3) 'Contacter le vendeur' opens floating chat with conversation. Offer submission sends message to seller via chat with emoji formatting.

minor.note: WebSocket reconnects successfully, messages still work via HTTP fallback

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 fixes implemented correctly and working
Offer modal has good UX with pre-filled price (90% of current), quick suggestions, and optional message
Chat integration properly shows offer message with emoji formatting
Vendor shop page loads correctly with vendor info and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-requested fixes verified: Voir la boutique, Faire une offre, Contacter le vendeur all working correctly. Stripe payment is MOCKED.

Voir la boutique button.details: Navigates to /vendeur-boutique/{seller_id}, shows vendor info (Level Business), displays vendor products

Faire une offre button.details: Opens modal with price input (pre-filled 90%), message textarea, quick suggestions (90%/85%/80%/75%), submits offer via chat

Contacter le vendeur button.details: Opens floating chat window, shows conversation with vendor, displays product context, allows sending messages

Offer submission flow.details: Creates conversation, sends offer message with emoji (💰 Offre de prix: X FCFA), opens chat to show conversation

Vendor shop page.details: Shows vendor avatar, name, location, member since date, subscriber count, rating, and all vendor products

screenshots_taken: product_page_initial.png - Product page with all buttons visible
vendor_shop_page.png - Vendor shop page (Level Business) with products
offer_modal_open.png - Offer modal with price input and suggestions
offer_modal_filled.png - Offer modal with filled price and message
after_offer_submit.png - Chat window showing offer message sent
